UpdateSourceArgs: -c "MetamodBuild=\"{{MetamodBuild}}\" && MetamodBranch=\"{{MetamodBranch}}\" && if [[ -z \"$MetamodBuild\" ]]; then wget -qO metamod.tar.gz \"https://metamodsource.net/latest.php?os=linux&version=$MetamodBranch\" && echo \"Latest Metamod $MetamodBranch build downloaded\" && exit 0; elif [[ ! \"$MetamodBuild\" =~ ^[0-9]+$ ]]; then echo \"Invalid Metamod build version format specified\" && exit 1; fi; if { [[ \"$MetamodBranch\" == \"2.0\" ]] && [[ \"$MetamodBuild\" -ge 1391 ]]; } || { [[ \"$MetamodBranch\" == \"1.12\" ]] && [[ \"$MetamodBuild\" -ge 1221 ]]; }; then DownloadURL=\"https://github.com/alliedmodders/metamod-source/releases/download/$MetamodBranch.0.$MetamodBuild/mmsource-$MetamodBranch.0-git$MetamodBuild-linux.tar.gz\"; else DownloadURL=\"https://mms.alliedmods.net/mmsdrop/$MetamodBranch/mmsource-$MetamodBranch.0-git$MetamodBuild-linux.tar.gz\"; fi; wget -qO metamod.tar.gz \"$DownloadURL\" && echo \"Metamod $MetamodBranch build $MetamodBuild downloaded\""

-NoProfile -Command "$ProgressPreference='SilentlyContinue'; [Net.ServicePointManager]::SecurityProtocol = [Net.SecurityProtocolType]::Tls12; $MetamodBuild='{{MetamodBuild}}'; $MetamodBranch='{{MetamodBranch}}'; if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($MetamodBuild)) { Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing -Uri \"https://metamodsource.net/latest.php?os=windows&version=$MetamodBranch\" -OutFile 'metamod.zip'; if ($?) { Write-Output \"Latest Metamod $MetamodBranch build downloaded\"; exit 0 } } elseif ($MetamodBuild -notmatch '^\d+$') { Write-Output \"Invalid Metamod build version format specified\"; exit 1 }; if (($MetamodBranch -eq '2.0' -and [int]$MetamodBuild -ge 1391) -or ($MetamodBranch -eq '1.12' -and [int]$MetamodBuild -ge 1221)) { $DownloadURL = \"https://github.com/alliedmodders/metamod-source/releases/download/$MetamodBranch.0.$MetamodBuild/mmsource-$MetamodBranch.0-git$MetamodBuild-windows.zip\" } else { $DownloadURL = \"https://mms.alliedmods.net/mmsdrop/$MetamodBranch/mmsource-$MetamodBranch.0-git$MetamodBuild-windows.zip\" }; Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing -Uri $DownloadURL -OutFile 'metamod.zip'; if ($?) { Write-Output \"Metamod $MetamodBranch build $MetamodBuild downloaded\" }"

-c "SourceModBuild=\"{{SourceModBuild}}\" && SourceModBranch=\"{{SourceModBranch}}\" && if [[ -z \"$SourceModBuild\" ]]; then wget -qO sourcemod.tar.gz \"https://sourcemod.net/latest.php?os=linux&version=$SourceModBranch\" && echo \"Latest SourceMod $SourceModBranch build downloaded\" && exit 0; elif [[ ! \"$SourceModBuild\" =~ ^[0-9]+$ ]]; then echo \"Invalid SourceMod build version format specified\" && exit 1; fi; if { [[ \"$SourceModBranch\" == \"1.13\" ]] && [[ \"$SourceModBuild\" -ge 7311 ]]; } || { [[ \"$SourceModBranch\" == \"1.12\" ]] && [[ \"$SourceModBuild\" -ge 7225 ]]; }; then DownloadURL=\"https://github.com/alliedmodders/sourcemod/releases/download/$SourceModBranch.0.$SourceModBuild/sourcemod-$SourceModBranch.0-git$SourceModBuild-linux.tar.gz\"; else DownloadURL=\"https://sm.alliedmods.net/smdrop/$SourceModBranch/sourcemod-$SourceModBranch.0-git$SourceModBuild-linux.tar.gz\"; fi; wget -qO sourcemod.tar.gz \"$DownloadURL\" && echo \"SourceMod $SourceModBranch build $SourceModBuild downloaded\""

-NoProfile -Command "$ProgressPreference='SilentlyContinue'; [Net.ServicePointManager]::SecurityProtocol = [Net.SecurityProtocolType]::Tls12; $SourceModBuild='{{SourceModBuild}}'; $SourceModBranch='{{SourceModBranch}}'; if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace($SourceModBuild)) { Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing -Uri \"https://sourcemod.net/latest.php?os=windows&version=$SourceModBranch\" -OutFile 'sourcemod.zip'; if ($?) { Write-Output \"Latest SourceMod $SourceModBranch build downloaded\"; exit 0 } } elseif ($SourceModBuild -notmatch '^\d+$') { Write-Output \"Invalid SourceMod build version format specified\"; exit 1 }; if (($SourceModBranch -eq '1.13' -and [int]$SourceModBuild -ge 7311) -or ($SourceModBranch -eq '1.12' -and [int]$SourceModBuild -ge 7225)) { $DownloadURL = \"https://github.com/alliedmodders/sourcemod/releases/download/$SourceModBranch.0.$SourceModBuild/sourcemod-$SourceModBranch.0-git$SourceModBuild-windows.zip\" } else { $DownloadURL = \"https://sm.alliedmods.net/smdrop/$SourceModBranch/sourcemod-$SourceModBranch.0-git$SourceModBuild-windows.zip\" }; Invoke-WebRequest -UseBasicParsing -Uri $DownloadURL -OutFile 'sourcemod.zip'; if ($?) { Write-Output \"SourceMod $SourceModBranch build $SourceModBuild downloaded\" }"

-NoProfile -Command "Set-Location -Path 'css/232330'; if (Test-Path 'cstrike/cfg/sourcemod') { Remove-Item -Path 'sm/cfg/sourcemod' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Out-Null }; if (Test-Path 'cstrike/addons/sourcemod/configs') { Remove-Item -Path 'sm/addons/sourcemod/configs' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Out-Null }; if (Test-Path 'cstrike/addons/sourcemod/plugins') { Remove-Item -Path 'sm/addons/sourcemod/plugins' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Out-Null }; Copy-Item -Path 'sm/*' -Destination 'cstrike' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Out-Null; Remove-Item -Path 'sm' -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Out-Null"

-c "cd css/232330 && [ -d cstrike/cfg/sourcemod ] && rm -rf sm/cfg/sourcemod >/dev/null 2>&1; [ -d cstrike/addons/sourcemod/configs ] && rm -rf sm/addons/sourcemod/configs >/dev/null 2>&1; [ -d cstrike/addons/sourcemod/plugins ] && rm -rf sm/addons/sourcemod/plugins >/dev/null 2>&1; \cp -rf sm/* cstrike/ >/dev/null 2>&1; rm -rf sm >/dev/null 2>&1"
/C cd css\232330\cstrike\addons > NUL 2>&1 && del /Q /F metamod.vdf > NUL 2>&1 & exit /b 0
